This exquisite bowl exhibits a confluence of characteristics that unequivocally point towards high-quality European tin-glazed earthenware, specifically French faience. The bedrock of this assessment lies in the **tin-glaze (men thiếc)**, which creates the distinctive opaque, smooth cream-white surface – a hallmark of faience (or majolica in Italy, delftware in the Netherlands).
